name: init_orchestrator
comment: outer init function called from PE entry chain

name: scripted_init_dispatcher
comment: reads bytecode from [0x57043c] dispatches on byte

name: render_one_cell
comment: sets viewport to 1x1 at cursor then walks tiles - per-cell driver

name: tile_walker_entry_a
comment: 4 static callers no xref to enclosing fn

name: tile_walker_entry_b
comment: calls 0x431323 once or twice (twice if width>0x180)

name: tile_walker_outer
comment: outer loop ECX from [0x5706a4] step 0x20 calls 0x43679a

name: tile_renderer_dispatch
comment: call [0x5a7980+ebp*4] - the only pixel-writing site - HIT 0 TIMES IN 300K BATCHES

name: tile_renderer_bail
comment: return / bail on bounds or visibility fail

name: game_tick
comment: reached when init completes (never reached in our runs)

name: file_checksum_verify
comment: not the bottleneck despite name pattern - on read paths but cheap vs decompress

name: checksum_inner_loop
comment: add al [edi]; rol eax 3; inc edi; loop

name: rle_decompress_loop
comment: Phase A bottleneck - call 0x42f5b0; mov [esi] al; inc esi; loop

name: viewport_x_origin_cursor
comment: global x cursor read by 0x4311c2 - NEGATIVE -4811 in stuck state

name: viewport_y_origin_cursor
comment: global y cursor read by 0x4311c2 - 667 in stuck state

name: sprite_type0_subdispatch_table
comment: indexed by sprite[0x31] inside type-0 renderer
